title: CI: kage pr check blocks only on hard-stale memory (still true in v2.2.0)
summary: kage pr check fails exit 2 only on hard stale memory cited evidence gone and missing validation/graph freshness; soft stale linked path changed since capture is a non blocking warning listed for review. Verified through
body: kage pr check fails (exit 2) only on hard-stale memory (cited evidence gone) and missing validation/graph freshness; soft-stale (linked path changed since capture) is a non-blocking warning listed for review. Verified through v2.2.0: repair/signal-gate/personal-memory changes did not alter the blocking boundary. Personal packets are structurally excluded from pr-check entirely (RecallResult.personal, never results).
